# matomo_tagmanager_variable_datalayer (Resource)

Reads a custom value from the Data-Layer.

## Example Usage

```terraform
provider "matomo" {}

resource "matomo_site" "example" {
  name = "Example DataLayer Site"
  urls = ["https://example-datalayer.example.com"]
}

resource "matomo_tagmanager_container" "example" {
  site_id = matomo_site.example.id
  context = "web"
  name    = "Example DataLayer Container"
}

resource "matomo_tagmanager_variable_datalayer" "example" {
  container_id = matomo_tagmanager_container.example.id
  name         = "example-datalayer"
  data_layer_name = "example-value"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `container_id` (String)
- `data_layer_name` (String) The name of any variable that is stored within the dataLayer. In case you want to access the value of a nested object, you can access the value of an object by separating each property by a dot, for example "object1.myPropertyOfObject1".
- `name` (String)

### Optional

- `default_value` (String)
- `description` (String) Optional free-text description, shown in Matomo's Tag Manager UI.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
